name: Artichoke Dip #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Defrost artichoke hearts and drain.
3. Mix together sour cream, mayonnaise, and grated Parmesan cheese in a bowl until well combined.
4. Add the defrosted artichoke hearts to the mixture and stir thoroughly.
5. Pour the mixture into a baking dish.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until hot and bubbly.
Makes 3 Cups
